summary: Experienced software engineer with expertise in full-stack development, cloud architecture, and DevOps practices. Proven track record in building scalable web applications, managing CI/CD pipelines, and leading cross-functional teams. Skilled in modern JavaScript frameworks, containerization, and agile methodologies.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
bullets: Developed and maintained full-stack web applications in a React/Node.js environment serving 50,000+ users
Collaborated with product and design teams to deliver features for flagship SaaS platform
Managed containerized microservices deployed on AWS ECS and Kubernetes
Implemented automated testing pipelines reducing release cycle time by 30%
Mentored junior developers and conducted code reviews to maintain code quality standards

experience.title: DevOps Engineer
bullets: Designed and maintained CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and GitHub Actions for 20+ microservices
Provisioned and managed cloud infrastructure on AWS using Terraform and CloudFormation
Implemented monitoring and alerting solutions using Prometheus, Grafana, and PagerDuty
Reduced infrastructure costs by 25% through resource optimization and reserved instance planning
Provided on-call support and incident response for production systems

experience.title: Junior Web Developer
bullets: Built and maintained client-facing websites using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and WordPress
Integrated third-party APIs including Stripe, Google Maps, and HubSpot
Performed routine database maintenance and performance tuning on MySQL instances
Collaborated with designers to ensure pixel-perfect implementation of UI mockups

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
